prompt: Icon that symbolise quantum encryption but with only 2 colors and one shape
remarks: Make sure its only one shape with clean lines and only use 2 colors
prompt_refined: An abstract icon symbolizing quantum encryption. The icon's entire design must be formed exclusively from variations, repetitions, or arrangements of a single geometric shape (e.g., circles, squares, or triangles). The final image must use only two distinct, solid colors, without any gradients or additional hues.
